channel.title: Supabase on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Supabase on Arrans github.io

item.title: supabase/supabase
item.description: The Postgres development platform. Supabase gives you a dedicated Postgres database to build your web, mobile, and AI applications.

item.title: marmelab/atomic-crm
item.description: A full-featured CRM built with React, shadcn/ui, and Supabase.
